items.summary: Update `frontend/src/sections/GallerySection.tsx` to remove the 7th image from the Gallery so it is not displayed as a tile and cannot be opened in the lightbox. The 7th image is currently the entry with `uploadSrc` `assets/uploads/IMG_0541-1.jpeg` (fallback `assets/generated/sgi-gallery-07-v2.dim_1200x1200.jpg`, alt `Textile Manufacturing Equipment`).
